stemHtml: An aircraft is on final approach, fully configured and cleared to land when suddenly a vehicle enters the runway and ATC tells the aircraft to go-around. The pilot then realises that the stabiliser trim is jammed. What should the pilot expect to happen?

options.c: The aircraft will become uncontrollable with a jammed stabiliser so a go-around is not an option.
options.d: A normal go-around, as the trim is not changed during this process.
